result.summary: The page is generally usable, but several elements appear clipped or obscured on the mobile viewport, suggesting horizontal overflow and insufficient spacing for fixed navigation.

issues.description: Multiple horizontal content areas are clipped at the right edge. The top category tab row cuts off the “Hot Games” tab, and game tiles in the right column are only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: If these are meant to be scrollable carousels, add clearer affordance such as spacing, snap behavior, or fade indicators. If not, adjust card widths/grid columns to fit within the viewport without horizontal overflow.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the lower row of game tiles.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the scrollable content equal to the height of the bottom navigation so content is not hidden behind it.

issues.description: The active bottom navigation item “Casino” appears visually inconsistent with the other nav labels: it is larger, underlined, and positioned lower, making it look like a broken text link rather than a selected tab.
issues.suggestion: Use a consistent nav label style and indicate the active state with color/icon styling rather than an underline that resembles a web link.

issues.description: The top header area is crowded with multiple logos, the Pennsylvania label, hamburger menu, and Join Now button, leaving little breathing room on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Reduce logo sizes or spacing, or consolidate branding elements so the header feels less cramped on small screens.
